brand.fixed_layout: 상단 3/5 이미지 + 하단 2/5 검정 텍스트 영역

layout.top: 3/5 — AI 생성 이미지 (인물+배경). 애니메 일러스트 스타일.
layout.bottom: 2/5 — 순수 검정(#000000). 사용자가 미리캔버스에서 텍스트 배치.
layout.prompt_rule: 프롬프트에 'The bottom 40% of the image is pure solid black (#000000), completely empty with no elements' 반드시 포함

art_style_guide.style: Korean historical anime illustration with bold black ink outlines, detailed cel-shaded coloring, dramatic action poses
art_style_guide.references: 진한 윤곽선 + 감정 과장된 표정 + 드라마틱 장면 구성 + 밝고 선명한 색감
art_style_guide.prompt_prefix: Vivid anime-style illustration with bold black ink outlines and cel-shaded coloring, Korean historical setting,
art_style_guide.avoid: photorealistic, 3D render, soft edges, blurry, watercolor

benchmark_analysis.text_layout: 2-line structure: small subtitle top + large keyword bottom, always in lower half
benchmark_analysis.color_tone: vivid saturated colors, bright fire/action scenes, strong contrast with bold outlines
benchmark_analysis.art_style: anime illustration with bold ink outlines, cel-shaded, dramatic composition
benchmark_analysis.face_style: expressive exaggerated emotions (fear, anger, determination), large detailed eyes
benchmark_analysis.notes: Korean historical anime style. Bold black outlines, dramatic action scenes with many characters, vivid fire/smoke effects. Crowd scenes with diverse emotional reactions. NOT photorealistic.
